recommendations.title: Anatomy of a Fall
recommendations.overview: A woman is suspected of her husband's murder, and their blind son faces a moral dilemma as the sole witness.

recommendations.title: The Blue Dahlia
recommendations.overview: Soon after a veteran returns from war, his cheating wife is found dead. He evades police in an attempt to find the real murderer.

recommendations.title: True Story
recommendations.overview: A drama centered on the relationship between journalist Michael Finkel and Christian Longo, an FBI Most Wanted List murderer who for years lived outside the U.S. under Finkel's name.

recommendations.title: Fugitive at 17
recommendations.overview: Suspected of murdering her best friend, a teenage computer-hacker goes on the run to find the real killer.

recommendations.title: Big Bad Wolves
recommendations.overview: The twisted paths of three very different men brutally collide due to a chain of unspeakable murders: a grieving father who has been doomed to seek vengeance and a police detective who boldly crosses the narrow boundary between law and crime meet a r

recommendations.title: Beast
recommendations.overview: A troubled woman living in an isolated community finds herself pulled between the control of her oppressive family and the allure of a secretive outsider suspected of a series of brutal murders.

recommendations.title: It Happened in Broad Daylight
recommendations.overview: The search for a child murderer drags a once-respected detective into an all-consuming obsession.

recommendations.title: The Offence
recommendations.overview: A burned-out British police detective finally snaps while interrogating a suspected child molester.

recommendations.title: WHAT DID JACK DO?
recommendations.overview: In a locked down train station, a homicide detective conducts an interview with a tormented monkey  who is suspected of murder.

recommendations.title: D.O.A.
recommendations.overview: Dexter Cornell, an English Professor becomes embroiled in a series of murders involving people around him. Dexter has good reason to want to find the murderer but hasn't much time. He finds help and comfort from one of his student, Sydney Fuller.
